The '''P-12 shield generator''' is a popular shield generator designed by [[Sirplex/Legends|Sirplex]]. It was installed on standard models of the [[ZH-25 Questor-class light freighter|ZH-25 Questor]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-02-XX -->{{JournalCite|5|A Buyer's Guide to Alternative Starships}}
